question.label: Direction
question.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
question.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

answer: id be head of my own pillar

assessment.note: Usman envisions being 'head of my own pillar' in 18 months, indicating a clear growth aspiration and engagement with future leadership.

new_queue.label: Head of own pillar
new_queue.name: Head of your own pillar — what specifically would that entail in terms of scope and responsibilities?

new_queue.label: Role anchor
new_queue.name: What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's stretching you?

new_queue.label: Facilitation skills
new_queue.name: Where are you most eager to stretch your facilitation skills next?

history.answer_excerpt: i dont have someone to guide me , it's really just me on my own
well where can I go next in the company?
id be head of my own pillar
